title: Outlook Integration Notification Options
excerpt: I’d like to have an option to send an email on a regular cadence for items within a certain group, or groups, based on multiple statuses.  The current option is limited to a status and will send to all line items on the …

posts.author: mmcmahon760 (Molly McMahon)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to have an option to send an email on a regular cadence for items within a certain group, or groups, based on multiple statuses. The current option is limited to a status and will send to all line items on the board with that status.
